---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run `graphi ...`
2. On repository / input '...'
3. See error

A minimal repository or input that reproduces the issue is the most helpful
thing you can provide.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- graphi version / commit: <!-- `graphi version` -->
- OS and architecture:
- Build flavor: default / `graphi-broad` / `webui_embed`
- Surface: CLI / MCP stdio / HTTP / TUI / VS Code

## Logs / output

<!-- Paste relevant output. graphi makes no network calls, so logs are local. -->
